title: Hollow Knight Origin
description: An origin that allows you to become the Hollow Knight from the Hollow Knight game made by Team Cherry
body:
# Requires Pehkui!
This mod adds the Hollow Knight origin From the Hollow Knight game by Team Cherry

## Abilities:
1. You don't take any fall damage
2. Natural Regen is disabled (you still get hungry tho)
3. Hearts don't work and instead of it you have masks, you lose 1 mask per hit no matter how strong the hit is but you only have 6 
4. Press your primary key while sneaking to focus soul and heal 1 mask, while focusing soul you can't move or attack
5. Soul is your key to healing and using spells, gain soul by hitting enemies
6. Just like the game, hitting your enemies will bounce you off them
7. Resting in a bed heals all of your masks
8. Mothwing Cloak: Dash forward quickly by pressing your secondary key.
9. Vengeful Spirit: Focus soul and summon a large projectile that deals 15 damage and pierces through enemies
10. As a bug you are 1 block tall
11. You can wall jump
12. You can double jump
